name: layla-server
author: Layla Network Pty Ltd
description: Layla P2P server powered by KoboldCPP orchestration.

scripts.package:cuda: npm run build && node -e "process.env.BUILD_FLAVOR='cuda'" && electron-forge make --targets @electron-forge/maker-squirrel
scripts.package:oldpc: npm run build && node -e "process.env.BUILD_FLAVOR='oldpc'" && electron-forge make --targets @electron-forge/maker-squirrel
